title: MobCatcher
description: The Ultimate Mob Capturing Plugin for Minecraft!
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ef6d957b6113f60b4a4c904b560bb5ca6c0f67a.png)
**MobCatcher** introduces an exciting way to capture and store mobs in Minecraft using a special net. Whether you're running an RPG, survival, or economy-based server, this plugin adds an engaging new mechanic that enhances gameplay.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fefc8a2608aef53f9d7a15fbfa4926353dda9c0.png)
# Why Choose MobCatcher?​
- ✅ Catch Mobs Like in Pokémon! – A fun and interactive way to collect animals
- ✅ Balanced Gameplay – Customize catch rates and restrictions for fairness
- ✅ Economy Support – Charge players in-game currency for capturing mobs
- ✅ Highly Customizable – Configure mob lists, durability, and more

# Key Features​
- Animal Capture Only – Designed for catching passive mobs
- Mob Restrictions – Prevents catching undead, bosses, pets, and rare creatures
# How to Use MobCatcher?​
- 1️⃣ Obtain the Catcher – Use **/givemobcatcher** to get the MobCatcher
- 2️⃣ Throw the Net – Right-click on a mob or throw the item to attempt a capture
- 3️⃣ Store & Transport – Caught mobs turn into an item that can be carried
- 4️⃣ Check Durability – The item's durability shows how many uses remain
- 5️⃣ Release the Mob – Right-click on a block to release it (after a 2-second delay)
- 6️⃣ Durability Mechanics – Missing reduces durability by 10%, successful captures by 20% (if at 10%, one last attempt is possible)
#                                      TEST ALL OUR PLUGINS HERE
#                                SERVER: javarangers.falixsrv.me:22707 >
#                             (PLEASE NOTE, server version 1.21.4)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e041fc64f693ef3314b9f9a3ed4a48a25a181e41.png)
# Pro Version Features (Paid Version)​
- Flexible Capture Rates – Configure custom success rates for different mobs
- Catch Area Restrictions – Disable capturing in specific biomes or worlds
- Economy Integration – Set a cost for catching mobs via Vault
- Monster Hunting Mode – Temporarily immobilize mobs for quests & events
- Enhanced Capture for Stronger Mobs – Improve success rates for bosses or rare creatures
- Special Trophy Drops – Caught mobs can drop rewards upon release or defeat
- Unique Boss Effects – Custom particles, sounds, and health changes for bosses
- Capture Timer – Set a time limit before mobs break free or disappear
​
# Transform your server with an exciting mob-catching system – Try MobCatcher today! ​
**Disclaimer:** These images are illustrative and do not represent actual in-game graphics. The final appearance may vary based on Minecraft's visual style and server settings.
